signup.subtitle: Create your free account
signup.emailSentBody: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click the link to activate your account.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.

screens.title: Voice becomes tasks
screens.body: Record or share any audio. AI extracts all tasks, deadlines, and owners automatically.

screens.title: Works everywhere
screens.body: Meetings, voice memos, calls, personal notes — any audio becomes an action list.

screens.title: Share with your team
screens.body: Add members to your plan. Everyone accesses history and extracted tasks in one place.

plans.title: Choose your plan
plans.subtitle: Cancel anytime. No commitment.
plans.subscribeAfter: You can subscribe after exploring the app.

home.subtitle: Upload your audio and let AI extract all tasks, deadlines, and owners for you.

upload.selectOrDrag: Select or drag an audio file
upload.noFile: Please select an audio file first.
upload.sharedNotAudio: Shared file is not a supported audio format.
